name: Eagle Ranch Golf Course
about: Eagle Ranch Golf Club is a 27-hole Arnold Palmer Signature Design course located in Eagle, Colorado, offering both on-course play and indoor golf simulator facilities. The venue operates with a traditional country club model, featuring seasonal memberships that include unlimited play and range privileges, alongside individual green fee pricing. It caters to golfers of all levels, with a strong focus on instruction, league play, and community events. The club combines outdoor mountain golf with indoor technology, providing year-round practice and play options for members and guests.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to an Arnold Palmer-designed mountain course with spectacular Rocky Mountain views
Year-round golf availability through indoor simulator facilities during harsh winter months
Comprehensive instructional programs with PGA professionals utilizing video analysis and Ping-certified fitting
Strong community focus through organized leagues, outings, and seasonal memberships

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service dining available at Eagle Ranch Grille with regular lunch specials and events
Full bar service available at clubhouse grille facility

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The club provides rental equipment, though players are welcome to bring their own clubs. Fitting services are available for club customization.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not permitted. The Eagle Ranch Grille offers full dining and bar services for all guests and members.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: Simulator play time varies by setup, but typically ranges from 1.5 to 2 hours for 18 holes depending on player pace and format chosen.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Eagle Ranch offers junior golf programs, youth lessons, and youth on course memberships. Children are welcome in both the simulator area and on the course with proper supervision.
